name: Lightspeed Commerce
description: Omnichannel commerce platform with REST APIs for retail and restaurant POS, inventory management, loyalty programs, and e-commerce integrations.

itemListElement.name: Lightspeed Retail X-Series API
itemListElement.description: REST API for Lightspeed Retail X-Series point-of-sale system enabling integrations for sales operations, product management, inventory updates, loyalty handling, and webhooks.

itemListElement.name: Lightspeed Retail R-Series API
itemListElement.description: REST API for Lightspeed Retail R-Series (formerly Vend) providing access to sales, inventory, customers, products, and reporting data.

itemListElement.name: Lightspeed eCom API
itemListElement.description: REST API for Lightspeed eCom (C-Series) e-commerce platform providing endpoints for products, orders, customers, shipments, payments, and inventory management.

itemListElement.name: Lightspeed Restaurant K-Series API
itemListElement.description: REST API for Lightspeed Restaurant K-Series POS system, enabling approved partners to build integrations for restaurant operations including menu management, orders, and payments.
